phase_999_3_closeout.summary: Backlog 999.3 (entity-link threshold re-validation on mE5-large) closed 2026-07-12. Realtime mE5-large cosine vectors produced via ModuleSpec-mocked torchvision bypass + transformers.XLMRobertaModel direct load. Default 12-entity cross-language corpus + curated distinct controls. Sweep T=0.75..0.98 documented in 999.3-VERDICT.md. Chosen T*=0.92 (conservative overmerge==0 fallback: 1 missed cross-lang merge accepted in exchange for zero false-merge safety). Mechanism bar PASSED; cross-lang merge bar FAILED for United States/США at 0.9169 (within trade); control separation bar PASSED (max_distinct=0.9151). ADR-006 §Consequences amended with 'Resolution (2026-07-12)' paragraph. ROADMAP.md backlog §999.3 flipped to closed.

completed_tasks.name: scripts/validate_entity_threshold.py rewrite (offline/http/synthetic + sweep + verdict branching + corpus-export)
999.3-VERDICT.md realtime overwrite (NO WARNING block; T*=0.92 explicit; clean sweep table)

human_actions_pending: Decimal phase dir created at .planning/phases/999.3-.../ but ROADMAP.md does not yet mark it [x] — already fixed in the 999.3 commit alongside the SPEC/PLAN/VERDICT.
Operator decision: push M1 (07-02..07-04 + this 999.3 commit) OR continue straight into Phase 8. Both are defensible.
Backlog follow-up suggestion: add Cyrillic↔Latin transliteration to _corpus_from_postgres so the Postgres-corpus run actually tests the cross-language bar.

decisions.decision: pgvector HNSW greedy centroid clustering per CCIR section
decisions.rationale: Replaces keyword-overlap fallback; semantic similarity via mE5-large embeddings
Full entity resolution deferred to Phase 8; interim heuristic sufficient for UAT

decisions.decision: Test-DSN pattern: INFOTRIAGE_TEST_DSN only, no fallback
decisions.rationale: Prevents prod DB wipe; guard test enforces

decisions.decision: threshold config: CLUSTER_THRESHOLD env var (0.0-1.0), default 0.75
decisions.rationale: Configurable threshold for clustering; validated in main.py

decisions.decision: View filters: COP/CIP/CRP (ADR-012); COP=operational/friendly, CIP=adversary/threat, CRP=user-configurable
decisions.rationale: Output lenses — don't change the LLM scorer, just render subsets

decisions.decision: TESSOC taxonomy: UK/NATO JDP 2-00 threat-actor frame (Terror/Espionage/Subversion/Sabotage/Organized Crime)
render_brief inline format (drop digest.line() which short-circuited title/score when why was truthy)
decisions.rationale: CAT_II/ROUTINE items were rendering `- <why>  [les](url)` with no title or score

decisions.decision: views.py:_normalize actually title-cases (was docstring-only); _matches_cip adds .upper() on ccir
decisions.rationale: Lowercase pmesii from seed_sample_data.py was failing case-sensitive _CIP_PMESII set membership; .title() corrupted 'PIR-1' → 'Pir-1' so ccir needed .upper() to undo it

decisions.decision: M1 ship-gate single 07-01 plan covers structured logging + DLQ consumer + ops Makefile + retire host scripts
decisions.rationale: Consolidates original 07-02/07-03/07-04 into one executable plan; the original 07-01 (FreshRSS ops) is already done

Replaces R3-bge-m3-misparse 0.85 with the value calibrated on real mE5-large vectors. Conservative overmerge==0 fallback in choose_threshold preferred over perfect collapse (false-merge entrench vs missed-merge recoverable on next item). PARTIAL verdict — no T clears both bars; 1 missed cross-lang merge (United States/США at 0.9169) accepted as part of the trade.

decisions.decision: scripts/validate_entity_threshold.py: three modes (offline / http / synthetic) with synthetic gated by --allow-synthetic
decisions.rationale: Default offline loads mE5-large from on-disk safetensors via ModuleSpec-mocked torchvision bypass + transformers.XLMRobertaModel direct load (mirrors R3 workaround). Synthetic SHA256-derived fallback is the path that produced the invalid placeholder VERDICT — must be opted-in explicitly and is NEVER the default.

prerequisite_commits.purpose: render_brief regression fix — prevent digest.line() short-circuit from dropping title/score
View-filter pipeline + TESSOC taxonomy (ADR-010) + 5 ADRs + UAT script seeds
Phase 6 UAT closure — 4 live UAT scripts + 06-UAT.md updated to 9/9
07-02 — uvicorn JSON access logs + live RMQ-mgmt DLQ depth probe + DSN smoke gate
07-03 — fix 3 services crash-looping on missing transitive contracts deps (per-requirements.txt hand-listing + aio-pika addition + TOML fix + vhost URL-encoding)

next_action: Backlog 999.3 closed (PARTIAL, T*=0.92). Phase 8 (Entity resolution) is now UNBLOCKED. Begin Phase 8 via /gsd-discuss-phase 8 with new T*=0.92 as input. NOTE: PRODUCTION code at apps/triage/entities.py::LINK_THRESHOLD = 0.85 and libs/store/_postgres.py::find_similar_entity(threshold=0.85) is INTENTIONALLY UNCHANGED by 999.3 — it is the Phase 8 plan's job to ship the in-repo threshold update after its SPEC + plan phases. M1 ship-gate still open: 5 unpushed Phase 7 commits (591034d, 3da4932, 428f8a9, b4ee46a, f17e644) + the new 999.3 commit; operator decision: push together, OR push 999.3 alone and continue to Phase 8.
context_notes: 999.3 spike closed 2026-07-12. Production-recommended LINK_THRESHOLD=0.92 (entity-level, on mE5-large) replaces the 0.85 R3-bge-m3-misparse. Spike method: ModuleSpec-mocked torchvision + transformers.XLMRobertaModel direct load; default 12-entity cross-language corpus + curated distinct control. Sweep table embedded in 999.3-VERDICT.md + phase 8 handoff. Mechanism bar PASS; merge bar FAIL on min_same=0.9169 (United States/США — 1 missed merge accepted); control separation bar PASS (max_distinct=0.9151). M1 Foundation still pending push: 07-02/07-03/07-03-docs/Makefile-recursion-fix/07-04 (already on local main) + this 999.3 commit (UNPUSHED). Phase 8 is now unblocked; backlog 999.3 was the precondition per USER continuation choice.

critical_anti_patterns.pattern: Writing SUMMARY before verifying artifacts on disk
critical_anti_patterns.description: 06-01 SUMMARY claimed deliverables not on disk
critical_anti_patterns.prevention: git status + ls first; never trust agent output
Test monkey-patch in isolation before integrating
Calibrate on held-out corpus; log merge decisions

critical_anti_patterns.description: sab_html.cluster called directly, not via module
critical_anti_patterns.prevention: Modify module function, not local reference

critical_anti_patterns.description: drops title/score when why is truthy
str.title() corrupts 'PIR-1' → 'Pir-1' (capitalizes first letter, lowercases rest); _matches_cip needs .upper() on ccir like _matches_cop does
critical_anti_patterns.prevention: Always use the pattern ccir = _normalize(row.get('ccir')).upper() when checking against uppercase sets or doing startswith on uppercase prefixes

critical_anti_patterns.pattern: torchvision mock via plain MagicMock() fails because transformers uses importlib.util.find_spec which raises ValueError on __spec__=None
critical_anti_patterns.description: ModuleSpec-with-origin=None needed; also stub torchvision.transforms + torchvision.io
critical_anti_patterns.prevention: Use the ModuleSpec-based mock pattern in scripts/validate_entity_threshold.py as the template for any future offline embedding spikes

critical_anti_patterns.pattern: Synthetic vectors silently elevate to real verdict
critical_anti_patterns.description: The original 999.3-VERDICT.md placeholder was produced by the SHA256 synthetic fallback; real-data spike now exposes the actual mE5-large geometry and is the only authoritative input for Phase 8 T*
critical_anti_patterns.prevention: scripts/validate_entity_threshold.py gates synthetic mode behind --allow-synthetic; mechanism bar (a) auto-verifies that vectors are not degenerate
